description: PILOT1 — committed scaffold of known-case pilot targets for FUTURE controlled live runs. This manifest does NOT authorize any live call by itself. It declares what each pilot would do (seed fixture, allowed free connectors, hard caps, expected verdict without any live data) so the runner can audit pilot intentions deterministically. Every pilot is bound by allow_paid_connectors=false (Brave / Firecrawl rejected), allow_downloads=false, allow_scraping=false, allow_llm=false, allow_resolvers limited to metadata-only resolvers (no file downloads), and a per-pilot max_live_calls budget that fits inside the existing live_safety hard caps (max_queries=3, max_results=5, max_connectors=2). media_required_for_produce is always true: even with all live data, a pilot may not graduate to PRODUCE without a verified media artifact + concluded outcome + high identity.

pilots.notes: WaPo UoF row alone cannot lock identity or graduate any artifact. Pilot would query CourtListener once for case-name corroboration; metadata-only resolvers may add document VerifiedArtifacts, but media is still required for PRODUCE.

Fatal Encounters row alone cannot lock identity. Pilot queries MuckRock once for FOIA-related agency requests. Resolver only graduates concrete public files; release-language-only sources stay as ArtifactClaims, never VerifiedArtifacts.
MPV row alone. Pilot queries DocumentCloud once for public document corroboration. Document-only finds will keep verdict at HOLD; PRODUCE requires media + concluded outcome + high identity.

Weak YouTube transcript with claim language only. Without live corroboration the case is HOLD; pilot queries CourtListener once for case-name corroboration. Claim text without a URL never becomes a VerifiedArtifact.

pilots.real_case_source: autoresearch/calibration_data.json case_id=1 (tier=ENOUGH); public docket records exist on justia.com and via court video on YouTube; closed case with sentenced outcome
pilots.notes: REAL1 / Endpoint v0 - real-case pilot seed (Min Jian Guan, San Francisco, sentenced 2024). Identity is pre-locked high in the seed (name + jurisdiction + agency + case_number anchors); outcome is sentenced. Dry verdict is HOLD (no_verified_media). Pilot queries DocumentCloud once for public document corroboration; with even one document URL graduated, Endpoint v0 condition 3 is fully met (high identity + concluded outcome + verified public artifact URL + classified type).

Pre-corroborated case (verified bodycam + concluded outcome + high identity) — the seed fixture already produces. Pilot adds a 2-connector live sweep to test whether additional document artifacts are surfaced without ever downgrading the verdict or violating any gate.
